summary: Cross-index triangulation of citation metadata: fetch the same work's canonical metadata from two or more bibliographic indexes, then run a deterministic offline comparator that emits a per-field agree/disagree/missing matrix and a fail-closed verdict (consistent / conflicted / insufficient_sources).

install.claude_code: Link into ~/.claude/skills or install via marketplace when available.
install.codex: Link into ~/.codex/skills for Codex native discovery.
